flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mountwest Community and Technical College fell 33% between 2006 and 2009 (14.6% → 9.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mountwest Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mountwest Community and Technical College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (990 → 1.2k).
